items.title: Thermal Systems Design
items.description: Thermodynamic modeling of combined cycles, waste heat recovery architectures, and cooling systems. Competitive experience designing closed loop thermal solutions for industrial and data center applications.

items.title: Structural Analysis and FEA
items.description: Static and dynamic finite element analysis in SolidWorks Simulation. Analytical hand calculations, mesh convergence studies, spring element modeling, and factor of safety validation under real loading conditions.

items.title: Hardware Prototyping
items.description: Rapid prototyping from concept to physical build using CNC machining, lathe, mill, 3D printing, and laser cutting. Embedded systems integration with Arduino, ESP32, and Raspberry Pi.

items.title: Engineering Communication
items.description: Technical writing, pitch presentations, and executive summaries for engineering and business audiences. Proven in two industry competitions with judges from energy and manufacturing sectors.
